title: Vileda Dust Pan & Brush Set - 2in1 Brush and Pan Set with Durable Bristles & Easy to Sweep Rubber Blade - Ergonomic Handle and Clip to Combine for Easy Storage
features: DUSTPAN AND BRUSH SET WITH EFFICIENT CLEANING - This product is a complete set that includes both dustpan and brush for fast and simple cleaning. Designed for quick and easy sweeping, capturing dust and debris effectively and features a wide dustpan with a rubber lip for seamless dirt collection
2 IN ONE FIBRE SWEEPER AND DURABLE BRISTLES - Ultra-thin black fibres collect even the finest dust while hard red fibres reach into stiff or angled corners and handle them with precise sweeping
ERGONOMICALLY DESIGNED - Unlike other brooms and brushes with bulky grips, the ergonomic short handle of the Vileda dustpan and brush set gives very comfortable movement while cleaning

VERSATILE USE AND COMPACT STORAGE - You can use the dustpan and brush set on multiple different materials and occasions. It easily cleans laminate floors, the tiles in your bathroom and even wooden surfaces. The rubber lip on front of dustpan helps remove up all the dust in one go

HANDY CLIP IN SYSTEM - Brush slots into dustpan handle for easy storage- folding the dustpan and brush set into a single unit with the convenient clip-in system allows easy and economic storage among your other cleaning tools
description: Product Description The Vileda 2 in 1 Dustpan set has been ergonomically designed to make sweeping up easier. The handbrush has two different types of bristle - soft black bristles for dust and smaller particles and stiffer red bristles for getting into edges and corners. The dustpan handle has a moulded handgrip to make it more comfortable to hold. The front of the dustpan has a soft rubber lip that helps remove all the dust and dirt in one sweep. For easy storage the brush slots securely into the handle of the dustpan.Made from durable plastic. Ingredients Broom housing and dustpan: 100% polypropylene. Bristles: recycled PET Manufacturer Contact Information Freudenberg Household Products LP, 2 Chichester Street, Rochdale, Lancashire, OL16 2AX. UK. See more
